name: Hydrogenoid Atom Engine
description: Interactive point-cloud and outer-isosurface visualization of hydrogen-like atomic orbitals, computed via generalized Laguerre / associated Legendre recurrences and Cartesian rejection sampling of |psi|^2.
knownLimitations: n capped at 8 due to rejection-sampling acceptance rate, not physics
wireframe draws outermost isosurface shell only
idle motion (spring-kick jitter, camera drift) is artistic, not physical
